title: Seoul AI Policy Conference 2026 (SAIPCON 2026)
description: Two-day conference exploring AI governance across education, finance, security, human rights, and more. Sessions focus on policy foundations of the AI era and real-world governance challenges. Topics include AI & Education, AI & Finance, AI Sovereignty & National Strategy, AI & Healthcare, AI & National Security, and more.

title: AI EXPO KOREA 2026
description: Korea's leading B2B AI exhibition featuring AI TECH 2026 conference, Global AI Summit, X+AI Conference, seminars, business networking, and AI Excellence Summit Awards. Comprehensive showcase of Korea's AI ecosystem.
description_local: 한국 최대 B2B AI 전시회. AI TECH 2026 컨퍼런스, 글로벌 AI 서밋, X+AI 컨퍼런스, 세미나, 비즈니스 네트워킹, AI 우수상 시상식 등 포함. 한국 AI 생태계의 종합적인 전시

title: 2026 꿈도 환승이 되나요 컨퍼런스 — 일하는 방식, AI로 환승하다
description: Agentic AI conference featuring 6 real-world case studies from startup CEOs, artists, and developers. Focuses on transforming work methods with AI rather than just learning AI tools. Hybrid event with both in-person and online streaming.
title_local: 2026 꿈도 환승이 되나요 컨퍼런스 — 일하는 방식, AI로 환승하다
description_local: AI를 배우는 자리가 아니라, AI와 함께 일하는 방식을 보는 자리. 6명의 실전 사례. 2026.06.20 서울 AI 허브. 에이전틱 AI 컨퍼런스. 스타트업 대표·예술가·개발자 6명의 실전 사례를 하루에.

title: AAAI 2026 Summer Symposium Series
description: Annual set of AI symposia running in parallel at a common site, designed to bring colleagues together in an intimate forum while providing a significant gathering point for the AI community. Features a two-and-a-half-day format for in-depth feedback and discussion.

title: Global AI Seoul
description: Global AI community meetup in Seoul, part of the worldwide Global AI Community network bringing together AI pioneers and practitioners for in-person networking and knowledge sharing.
description_local: 전 세계 글로벌 AI 커뮤니티 네트워크의 일환으로 서울에서 개최되는 AI 실무자 및 선구자들을 위한 대면 밋업 및 지식 공유 행사

title: KCC 2026 Explainable AI (XAI) Workshop
description: Third annual KCC Explainable AI Workshop organized by KAIST, featuring latest research and industry case studies on explainable AI, transparency, and safety in AI systems including large language models.
description_local: 지난 2023년, 2024년에 이어 올해 제3회 'KCC 설명가능 인공지능(XAI) 워크숍'을 개최합니다. 설명가능 인공지능 분야 최신 연구와 산업 실증 사례를 소개하고 기술 발전 방향에 대해 소통하는 귀한 시간이 될 것입니다.

title: Push to Prod SEOUL
description: An official NextRise 2026 side event co-hosted by Anthropic, Replit, Korea Investment Partners (KIP), and Korea Investment Accelerator (KIAC). Showcases ambitious AI, deep tech, robotics, mobility, bio/healthcare startups. Engineers and experts from Anthropic and Replit will attend in person. A 2-hour demo event demonstrating how Korean startups solve real problems with AI across various verticals.
title_local: Push to Prod SEOUL [Anthropic X Replit X Korea Investment Partners & Accelerator]
description_local: 이번 서울 에디션은 Anthropic, Replit, 한국투자파트너스(KIP), 한국투자액셀러레이터(KIAC)와 함께 한국에서 가장 야심찬 AI, 딥테크, 로보틱스, 모빌리티, 바이오/헬스케어, 소부장, 방산 등 스타트업 팀들을 한자리에 모십니다. 각자의 vertical에서 AI로 진짜 문제를 어떻게 풀어내는지를, 글로벌 무대 위에서 직접 증명하는 자리입니다. 당일에는 Anthropic과 Replit 본사 엔지니어와 전문가들이 직접 현장에 함께합니다.

title: Festival of Learning 2026 (AIED 2026, ACM Learning at Scale)
description: Co-located conferences bringing together academic communities in AI, Education, Learning Sciences, and Human-Computer Interaction. Workshops/tutorials June 27-28, paper/poster sessions June 29-July 3. Includes the 27th International Conference on AI in Education focusing on Generative AI and its impact on learning.

title: ACM Learning at Scale 2026
description: The ACM Learning at Scale conference is part of the Festival of Learning 2026 in Seoul. Workshops on June 29; paper/poster sessions between June 30 – July 3.

title: AIED 2026 - 27th International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
description: AIED 2026 serves as a vibrant forum for researchers, practitioners, and policymakers to explore and shape the evolving landscape of AI in education. The conference invites critical and creative examination of how emerging technologies, especially Generative AI, are transforming the roles of both humans and AI in learning.

title: FAR.AI Open Social in Seoul
description: An informal evening of networking and conversation for participants of the FAR.AI Seoul Alignment Workshop. Open to anyone interested in AI alignment and related fields. Light refreshments and one complimentary drink per guest provided.
description_local: FAR.AI 서울 정렬 워크숍 참가자들을 위한 비공식 네트워킹 및 대화의 저녁. AI 정렬 및 관련 분야에 관심 있는 모든 사람에게 열려 있습니다.

title: 2026 Skill-Up Festa (Work Expert Festa)
description: Three-day event focused on AI-driven work transformation, automation, smart work, and organizational culture. Features conferences, workshops, and exhibitions on AI agents, digital transformation, and future of work.
description_local: AI 에이전트, 업무 자동화, 스마트워크, 조직문화 등 업무 혁신을 다루는 3일간의 대규모 행사입니다. 컨퍼런스, 워크숍, 전시를 통해 AI 시대의 일하는 방식을 제안합니다.

title: Cortiq Summit 2026: Agentic AI
description: An invitation-only forum during ICML 2026 Seoul week for senior researchers, builders, and partners. Features talks, live agent demonstrations, awards, and curated one-to-one introductions focusing on Agentic AI.
description_local: ICML 2026 서울 주간 중 개최되는 초청 전용 포럼. 고급 연구자, 빌더 및 파트너를 위한 강연, 라이브 에이전트 데모, 시상 및 일대일 소개가 포함됨.

title: Trillion Frontier Night x ICML 2026
description: Evening networking event during ICML week, starting 6:00pm. Part of the Road to ICML community events bringing together global researchers and Korea's AI builders.
description_local: ICML 주간 저녁 네트워킹 이벤트로, 글로벌 연구자와 한국 AI 빌더들이 만나는 자리입니다.

title: D4D | Deploy for Defense Hackathon APAC — SEOUL
description: Two-day defense-focused AI hackathon running July 4-5, 2026 as part of ICML week activities
title_local: D4D | Deploy for Defense Hackathon APAC — 서울
description_local: 7월 4-5일 양일간 진행되는 방산 관련 AI 해커톤

title: ICML Night — Instruct.KR x Exa AI Search Technology Meetup in Seoul
description: Evening meetup focused on AI search technology, co-hosted by Instruct.KR and Exa during ICML week
title_local: ICML Night — Instruct.KR x Exa AI 검색 기술 밋업
description_local: AI 검색 기술에 초점을 둔 저녁 밋업

title: ProbML 2026
description: Full-day probabilistic machine learning event on July 5, the day before ICML 2026 begins
description_local: 확률적 머신러닝 관련 전일 이벤트

title: Ralphthon @ICML by Team Attention
description: Hackathon event during ICML week organized by Team Attention. Time and exact RSVP link to be announced.
description_local: Team Attention이 주최하는 ICML 주간 해커톤 이벤트입니다.

title: SMW AI Networking Mixer before ICML
description: Seoul Meta Week AI networking event the evening before ICML 2026 starts
description_local: ICML 시작 전날 저녁 AI 네트워킹 이벤트

title: FriendliAI Night at ICML 2026
description: Evening networking event hosted by FriendliAI on the first day of ICML 2026
description_local: FriendliAI 주최 ICML 첫날 저녁 네트워킹

title: ICML 2026 - International Conference on Machine Learning
description: The International Conference on Machine Learning (ICML) is the premier gathering of professionals dedicated to the advancement of machine learning. ICML is globally renowned for presenting and publishing cutting-edge research on all aspects of machine learning. July 6: Expo/Tutorial Day; July 7–9: Main Conference; July 10–11: Workshops.

title: ICML Dinner with VESSL AI
description: Evening dinner event hosted by VESSL AI on July 6 during ICML 2026
description_local: VESSL AI 주최 저녁 만찬

title: Seoul Alignment Workshop 2026
description: Workshop bringing together global leaders in academia and industry to deepen collective understanding of the potential risks from Artificial General Intelligence (AGI) and collaboratively explore effective strategies for mitigating these risks. Core topics include model evaluations, interpretability, robustness, scalable oversight, and AI governance.
description_local: 인공 일반 지능(AGI)의 잠재적 위험에 대한 집단적 이해를 심화하고 이러한 위험을 완화하기 위한 효과적인 전략을 협력적으로 탐구하기 위해 학계와 업계의 글로벌 리더들이 모이는 워크숍입니다.

title: TAIC'26: Thinking about AI's Capability
description: Day-long workshop on AI capability research held on July 6 during ICML week
description_local: AI 역량 연구 관련 워크숍

title: Cafe Compute @ICML
description: Evening compute-focused meetup on July 7 during ICML week
description_local: 컴퓨팅 관련 저녁 밋업

title: Cantina Labs @ ICML 2026 Community Dinner
description: Community dinner hosted by Cantina Labs on July 7
description_local: Cantina Labs 주최 커뮤니티 만찬

title: Infineon AI Summit Seoul 2026
description: Co-hosted by Infineon Technologies and the Korean-German Chamber of Commerce and Industry (KGCCI), this landmark summit unites AI ecosystem leaders from Korea and Germany. The event highlights Korea's rapidly growing AI datacenter infrastructure market and serves as a strategic platform for government agencies, enterprises, SMEs, and academia from both nations to explore synergies and partnership opportunities. Time: 18:30 - 21:00 KST.

title: Math x MIT: ICML After-Dinner Drinks with E14 Fund and Axiom
description: Evening drinks and networking with MIT-affiliated attendees, E14 Fund and Axiom
title_local: Math x MIT: ICML 애프터 디너 드링크
description_local: MIT, E14 Fund, Axiom과 함께하는 저녁 네트워킹

title: Goodfire ICML Happy Hour
description: Happy hour networking event hosted by Goodfire on July 8
description_local: Goodfire 주최 해피아워

title: ICML 2026: AI x Education
description: Evening event focusing on AI in education during ICML week
description_local: 교육 분야 AI 관련 저녁 이벤트

title: ICML Happy Hour: Liner x VESSL AI - Research to Scale
description: Happy hour co-hosted by Liner and VESSL AI on scaling research
title_local: ICML Happy Hour: Liner x VESSL AI - Research to Scale
description_local: Liner와 VESSL AI 공동 주최 해피아워

title: Turing @ ICML: After Hours
description: Evening networking event hosted by the Turing Institute during ICML week
description_local: 튜링 연구소 주최 저녁 네트워킹

title: Global Data Space Forum
venue: Korea Press Center 20F International Conference Hall, Seoul
description: A forum on AI, data, Gaia-X, data spaces, and international data research collaboration.
description_local: AI, 데이터, Gaia-X, 데이터스페이스, 국제데이터연구협력기구에 관한 포럼입니다.

title: 2026 Seoul AI Administrative Innovation Forum
venue: Korea Chamber of Commerce and Industry International Conference Hall, Seoul
description: The 2nd Seoul AI Administrative Innovation Forum organized by Seoul AI Foundation, featuring global cities and experts including Tokyo, Dubai, Singapore, and MIT. The forum focuses on sharing global AI innovation cases and discussing cooperation plans for public AI administrative innovation.
description_local: 서울AI재단 주최로 '서울에서 만나는 AI 혁신의 미래, AI CITY SEOUL'을 주제로 국내외 도시 관계자와 AI 연구기관 전문가가 한자리에 모여 시민이 체감하는 AI 행정혁신 사례를 공유하고 글로벌 공공 AI 협력 방안을 논의하는 포럼입니다.

title: International Conference on Artificial Intelligence and Design (AID)
description: International conference for researchers, scientists, scholars, engineers, and practitioners to present research activities in AI and Design. Scheduled for July 17-19, 2026.

title: International Conference on Next-Generation AI Technologies (ICNGAIT)
description: International academic conference focused on next-generation AI technologies. Part of the series of AI conferences held in Seoul in July 2026.
description_local: 차세대 AI 기술에 중점을 둔 국제 학술 컨퍼런스입니다.

title: Seoul Tech Mixer and Social (Tech / AI / Data / IT)
description: Tech and AI networking social event for professionals in tech, AI, data, and IT sectors. Regular monthly meetup series.
title_local: 서울 테크 믹서 및 소셜 (Tech / AI / Data / IT)
description_local: 기술, AI, 데이터 및 IT 분야 전문가를 위한 테크 및 AI 네트워킹 소셜 이벤트입니다.

title: International Conference on Legal and Regulatory Frameworks in Artificial Intelligence (ICLRFAI)
description: Conference focusing on legal and regulatory aspects of AI. Covers AI governance, ethics, policy frameworks, and compliance. Virtual and in-person attendance options available.
title_local: 인공지능의 법적 및 규제 프레임워크 국제 컨퍼런스
description_local: AI의 법적 및 규제 측면에 초점을 맞춘 컨퍼런스입니다. AI 거버넌스, 윤리, 정책 프레임워크 및 규정 준수를 다룹니다.

title: AI Summit Seoul & EXPO 2026
venue: COEX Grand Ballroom & Hall B, Seoul
description: 9th annual global AI conference bringing together AI leaders, innovators, enterprises, startups, and policymakers. Focus on Agentic AI, Enterprise AI, Physical AI, and industry-specific AI applications. Conference runs Aug 19-20, Expo runs Aug 19-21.
description_local: AI Summit Seoul & EXPO는 2018년 이래로 매년 서울에서 개최되는 세계적인 AI 컨퍼런스입니다. AI와 산업의 융합에 초점을 두고 다양한 글로벌 기업과 기관, 학계 전문가 등 대규모의 전문가들이 한자리에 모입니다. 올해 9주년을 맞이하는 행사에서는 올해 화두인 AI Agent, Agentic AI부터, 피지컬 AI 및 각 산업별 AI 융합 등 최신 트렌드와 전략을 가장 먼저 선보입니다.

title: AI Summit Seoul & Expo 2026
venue: COEX Grand Ballroom & Exhibition Hall B, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
description: Korea's leading AI conference and exhibition bringing together global AI leaders, industry experts, and innovators. Features conference sessions, enterprise case studies, and dynamic expo showcasing cutting-edge AI technologies including Generative AI, Large Language Models, Enterprise AI, AI Transformation, and Agentic AI. Expected attendance: 30,000 people with 1,500 exhibitors.

title: AI Summit Seoul 2026 (AIS 2026)
venue: COEX Grand Ballroom & Exhibition Hall B, Gangnam-gu, Seoul
description: Korea's leading AI conference and exhibition bringing together global AI leaders, industry experts, and innovators. Features conference sessions, enterprise case studies, and a dynamic expo showcasing cutting-edge AI technologies. Focuses on convergence of AI and industry.

title: KHF 2026 - K-Hospital+Health Tech Fair
description: Korea's largest digital healthcare exhibition showcasing medical devices, hospital equipment, health-tech, medical AI and robotics. B2B platform for healthcare providers, medical device manufacturers, health-tech startups and technology partners.
title_local: KHF 2026 - 병원·의료 IT 및 헬스케어 박람회
description_local: 의료기기, 병원 장비, 헬스케어 기술, 의료 AI 및 로봇을 선보이는 한국 최대 디지털 헬스케어 전시회. 의료 제공자, 의료 기기 제조업체, 헬스테크 스타트업 및 기술 파트너를 위한 B2B 플랫폼.

title: DAH 2026
description: LIG DNA event focused on agentic AI, AI hackathon, and cybersecurity
description_local: LIG DNA 주최 에이전틱 AI, AI 해커톤, 사이버보안 관련 행사

title: Try Everything 2026
description: Seoul's flagship global startup festival connecting domestic entrepreneurs with international investors, corporate giants and tech innovators. Operating under the slogan 'AI Changes Everything, Now Try Everything', the festival focuses on artificial intelligence, robotics, healthcare and fintech.
description_local: 서울시 최대 글로벌 스타트업 축제. AI가 모든 것을 바꾸는 지금, 모든 것을 시도하라는 슬로건으로 인공지능, 로보틱스, 헬스케어, 핀테크에 초점을 맞춘 행사입니다.

title: International Conference on Computing and Information Technology (ICCIT)
description: International conference on computing and information technology including machine learning topics.
title_local: International Conference on Computing and Information Technology (ICCIT)
description_local: 컴퓨팅 및 정보 기술에 관한 국제 컨퍼런스

title: The 6th Korea Artificial Intelligence Conference
venue: Sono Calm Jeju (not Seoul - in Jeju)
source: Korean Institute of Communications and Information Sciences
description: Organized by the Korean Institute of Communications and Information Sciences AI Society. Features keynote speeches, top conference tutorials, AI convergence workshops, and undergraduate paper competition. September 30 - October 3, 2026. Note: This event is in Jeju, not Seoul.

title: AI Festa 2026
venue: COEX Hall C and Surrounding Area, Seoul
description: Korea's largest AI festival and official event of the National AI Week designated by the Ministry of Science and ICT. A comprehensive platform featuring exhibitions, conferences, business matching, and awards, connecting policy, industry, and technology. The event showcases how AI is being realized and operating in actual industries and society. Running from October 6-8, 2026.
description_local: 과학기술정보통신부가 지정한 국가 공식 '인공지능주간(AI Week)'의 대표 행사로, 대한민국 AI 산업 생태계를 이끄는 글로벌 비즈니스 플랫폼입니다. 전시, 컨퍼런스, 비즈니스 매칭, 어워즈를 아우르는 국내 최대 규모 AI 통합 플랫폼으로, 정책·산업·기술을 연결합니다. 2026년 10월 6-8일 개최됩니다.

title: Seoul AI Festival 2026
description: Citizen-focused AI festival featuring AI technology experiences, competitions, exhibitions, and public programs. Includes AI Seoul Essay Contest, Youth AI Art Competition, and AI Robot Family Contest award ceremonies.
description_local: 시민의 일상 속 인공지능 기술을 보고, 느끼고, 즐기며 AI가 만들어갈 도시의 미래를 함께 경험하는 축제. 제2회 AI 서울 백일장·사생대회, 제2회 청소년 AI 아트공모전, 제2회 AI 로봇 가족 경진대회 시상식 등이 포함됩니다.

title: Smart Tech Korea 2026 (STK 2026) - AI & Big Data Show
description: The 15th Smart Tech Korea exhibition featuring AI & Big Data Show, Robot Tech Show, AI+ Smart Factory Show, and more. Includes conferences and seminars on manufacturing AI transformation, SCM AI Forum 2026, and AI semiconductor technology.
description_local: 인공지능 & 빅데이터쇼, 로봇테크쇼, AI+ 스마트팩토리쇼 등을 포함한 제15회 스마트테크 코리아 전시회. 제조AX 컨퍼런스, SCM AI Forum 2026, AI 반도체 전자실장기술 세미나 등 컨퍼런스 및 세미나 포함.

title: 2026 Seocho AI Festa
description: Second annual Seocho AI Festa featuring 50+ AI experience booths, physical AI (robotics) zone, citizen participation contests, and future technology experience programs. Community-focused AI festival.
description_local: 제2회 서초 AI 페스타로 50개 이상의 AI 체험부스, 피지컬 AI(로봇)존, 주민 참여 공모전, 미래기술 체험 프로그램 등이 펼쳐지는 주민 참여형 AI 축제입니다.

title: ACML 2026 - The 18th Asian Conference on Machine Learning
description: The 18th Asian Conference on Machine Learning aims to provide a leading international forum for researchers in machine learning and related fields to share their new ideas, progress and achievements. The conference calls for high-quality, original research papers in the theory and practice of machine learning.
description_local: 머신러닝 및 관련 분야 연구자들이 새로운 아이디어, 진행 상황 및 성과를 공유할 수 있는 주요 국제 포럼. 머신러닝 이론 및 실무에 관한 고품질의 독창적인 연구 논문 발표.

title: Web3 AI Seoul: The Future of Work
description: A groundbreaking event exploring the intersection of Web3 and AI, focused on the future of work. Brings together leading academic institutions, professionals, and thought leaders. Features a Challenge Day where participants engage in interactive challenges, gain hands-on experience, and compete for prizes. Co-organized by AI Network and Blockmedia.
title_local: Web3 AI Seoul: The Future of Work
description_local: Web3와 AI의 교차점을 탐구하는 획기적인 행사입니다. 주요 학술 기관, 전문가 및 사상가들이 모여 Web3와 AI의 최신 발전을 논의합니다. 이 행사는 '업무의 미래'를 탐구하고 이러한 기술이 산업을 어떻게 변화시킬지 이해하는 것을 목표로 합니다.
